name: Flying Wheels Evolution
author: Poki
description: Flying Wheels Evolution is a high-flying adventure that takes car games to the next level, literally! Drag, aim, and release to launch your futuristic flying car into the sky, then glide as far as you can in this epic fusion of car jumping and flight simulator fun. Build momentum, find the perfect angle, and master the skies to become the ultimate flying car racer. How far can your wheels take you? How to play Flying Wheels Evolution? Swipe to fly the car, and move left or right to change the direction.. Who created Flying Wheels Evolution? Flying Wheels Evolution is created by GeniGames. Play their other games on Poki: Perfect Landing, Plane Pilot ! How can I play Flying Wheels Evolution for free? You can play Flying Wheels Evolution for free on Poki. Can I play Flying Wheels Evolution on mobile devices and desktop? Flying Wheels Evolution can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
